evals.prompt: I changed a FastAPI endpoint to require a new permission, updated tests, and there is a docs/doc-map.yml in the repo. Close out the work.
evals.expected_output: Consults the doc map, routes the auth/security documentation impact, updates or flags the relevant docs, and includes a complete Doc Delta block.

evals.prompt: Review this PR. It adds a Supabase migration and a feature flag but does not touch docs.
evals.expected_output: Does not edit docs during review unless asked, but reports a documentation finding or closeout noting required updates to production-deploy or migration docs.

evals.prompt: I only renamed a private helper and fixed its unit test. No user-facing behavior changed. Give me the final response.
evals.expected_output: Includes a Doc Delta block only if closeout is expected, marks Doc impact no, and explains that there were no behavior, contract, setup, operations, or architecture changes.
